scope.postureChecks: Read-only Linux host checks for vulnerable kernel posture, risky module state, Trend Micro Deep Security Agent hook reload indicators, System Register Hijacking / ret2entry research indicators, ITScape ARM64 KVM exposure, DirtyCBC/RxGK and DirtyClone page-cache poisoning research-artifact leads, PackageKit CVE-2026-41651 local-privilege-escalation posture and advisory-provenance indicators, cloud bucket hijacking storage-data-stream posture indicators, MCP Python SDK CVE-2026-52869 HTTP transport principal-confusion indicators, Amazon Q Developer / AWS Language Servers workspace MCP auto-execution and symlink-boundary indicators, Langflow CVE-2026-33017 public-flow RCE and cryptominer campaign indicators, known supply-chain persistence paths, selected compromised npm package references, AtomicArch/IronWorm AUR indicators, DPRK npm RAT dependency indicators, OtterCookie npm indicators, Hades PyPI/Miasma indicators, Miasma ImmobiliareLabs npm indicators, macOS.Gaslight mounted-root indicators, Agentjacking Sentry/MCP exposure indicators, 0DIN clean-repo DNS TXT agent-setup indicators, Solana FakeFix/CMS loader indicators, GlassWASM/Open VSX extension indicators, Chrome Native Messaging session-cookie theft indicators, Adblock for YouTube browser-extension review indicators, VS Code folder-open npm autorun indicators, TonRAT Photo ZIP phishing indicators, FFmpeg PixelSmash/MagicYUV media-processing exposure, Heaven's Gate WOW64 evasion review indicators, nf_tables CVE-2026-23111 local-privilege-escalation posture and PoC-provenance indicators, Palo Alto GlobalProtect CVE-2026-0257 log-hunting indicators, Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager 2026 zero-day log-hunting indicators, Operation Highland / Velvet Ant auth-stack indicators, and TeamPCP/Dynatrace weak-signal exposure indicators.
scope.notInScope: No exploit testing, malware execution, automatic cleanup, token revocation, or claims that a host is clean.
scope.fragnesia: CVE-2026-46300 affects supported AlmaLinux releases through esp4, esp6, and in some AlmaLinux 9/10 cases rxrpc. Built-in patched kernel thresholds follow AlmaLinux's May 13, 2026 disclosure.
scope.itscapeArm64Kvm: CVE-2026-46316 / ITScape affects ARM64 KVM hosts through a vGIC-ITS race condition. The guard flags ARM64 KVM exposure and asks operators to verify vendor-fixed kernels or backports, with upstream 6.15.0 used as a review baseline.
scope.trendMicroHookReloadBypass: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for MatheuZ-reported Trend Micro Deep Security Agent BMHook/TMHook reload-bypass evidence, including bmhook/tmhook/dsa_filter modules, ds_am.init module reload behavior, livepatch unpatch/patch transitions, LKM DOWN breadcrumbs, and event-storm or telemetry-drop terms.
scope.systemRegisterHijackingResearch: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for System Register Hijacking / ret2entry research references, including swapgs Stack Pivoting, KERNEL_GSBASE_MSR, MSR_GSBASE, entry_SYSCALL_64, entry_SYSCALL_compat, FineIBT/KERNEL_IBT/kCFI bypass context, native_write_cr4/native_write_cr0, CR-Pinning, aarch64 ELR_EL1/VBAR_EL1/PAN terms, and PoC provenance markers.
scope.dirtyCbcRxgk: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Delphos DirtyCBC / Linux RxGK decrypt-before-MAC page-cache poisoning notes, AF_RXRPC/YFS-RxGK RESPONSE code-path markers, MSG_SPLICE_PAGES, upstream fix marker aa54b1d27fe0, and public PoC provenance terms.
scope.dirtyClone: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for JFrog and DBugs DirtyClone / CVE-2026-43503 and Copy Fail / CVE-2026-31431 DirtyFrag-family notes, CVSS 8.8 high-severity posture, __pskb_copy_fclone, nf_dup_ipv4, skb_shinfo, SKBFL_SHARED_FRAG, XFRM/IPsec and CAP_NET_ADMIN/user-namespace exposure terms, upstream fix markers, multi-tenant container/CI exposure language, and public PoC provenance terms.
scope.packageKitCve202641651: Checks Debian-family PackageKit package versions and local/mounted-root metadata for PackageKit CVE-2026-41651 local privilege-escalation notes, affected upstream versions 1.0.2 through 1.3.4, fixed version 1.3.5, InstallFiles, pk_transaction_set_state, transaction->cached_transaction_flags, TOCTOU/CWE-367 language, GHSA-f55j-vvr9-69xv, and Pack2TheRoot provenance markers.
scope.cloudBucketHijacking: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for cloud bucket hijacking posture notes involving same-name bucket recreation after bucket deletion, active cloud data streams, audit logs, telemetry, Google Cloud Logging sinks, Pub/Sub Cloud Storage destinations, Storage Transfer Service jobs, AWS S3 replication, Amazon Data Firehose, Azure Monitor diagnostic exports, bucket/storage-account delete permissions, and perimeter mitigations such as VPC Service Controls, AWS Service Control Policies, and account-regional S3 namespaces.
scope.mcpPythonSdkCve202652869: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for MCP Python SDK CVE-2026-52869 / GHSA-jpw9-pfvf-9f58, PyPI mcp versions before 1.27.2, SSE SseServerTransport/session_id exposure, stateful Streamable HTTP StreamableHTTPSessionManager/Mcp-Session-Id exposure, bearer-token/authenticated-principal context, AccessToken.subject, BearerAuthBackend, and hosted or multi-tenant per-user subject isolation notes.
scope.amazonQWorkspaceMcp: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for AWS bulletin 2026-047-AWS, Amazon Q Developer / Language Servers for AWS CVE-2026-12957 and CVE-2026-12958, GHSA-6v3r-4p5c-mrp5, GHSA-xhcr-j4j9-3gh7, Amazon Q plugin versions before fixed releases, .amazonq/mcp.json workspace MCP command configs, command/args execution, AWS credential and SSH-agent inheritance terms, aws sts get-caller-identity proof-of-concept language, and symlink trust-boundary review terms.
scope.dynatraceTeamPcp: Weak-signal checks flag Dynatrace token-shaped values and TeamPCP/Dynatrace screenshot repo/service strings in scanned metadata. These findings are correlation leads and do not prove compromise by themselves.
scope.hadesPyPi: Checks for affected PyPI package versions, executable .pth startup hooks, Bun/_index.js loader behavior, native .abi3.so launcher layouts, and Hades GitHub/CI exfiltration or seeding markers from June 2026 Socket/SecurityWeek/JFrog reporting.
scope.miasmaImmobiliareLabsNpm: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Socket-reported Miasma Mini Shai-Hulud @immobiliarelabs Backstage npm package versions, Phantom Gyp binding.gyp root-index loaders, Bun v1.3.13 and AES/Caesar-shift loader terms, credential-theft targets, deployment-triggered GitHub Actions release automation, codfish/semantic-release-action leads, exfil repository markers, and AI/IDE persistence paths.
scope.macosGaslight: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for SentinelOne-reported macOS.Gaslight SHA-256 values, Apple XProtect labels, LaunchAgent label, Telegram Bot API polling/exfiltration terms, standalone CPython staging constants, Keychain/browser collection terms, and LLM-triage prompt-injection bait.
scope.atomicArchAur: Checks for AtomicArch/IronWorm AUR build metadata that references atomic-lockfile or invokes npm/npx loaders from PKGBUILD/.SRCINFO/install hooks.
scope.agentjackingSentryMcp: Checks for Sentry MCP/agent wiring, Sentry-style fake Resolution text that asks agents to run npx diagnostics, and Tenet Agentjacking validation markers.
scope.odinDnsTxtAgentSetup: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for 0DIN-reported clean-repo agent setup abuse involving first-time setup instructions, python -m module init commands, package errors that ask for init recovery, dig-based DNS TXT configuration fetches, bash/sh execution of fetched TXT data, base64 decode pipes, and the demo-specific axiom/_axiom-config.m100.cloud markers.
scope.csc154InternalDepend: Checks for npm package csc154-internall-depend from GitHub Advisory GHSA-m3gw-x6rc-fp3r; all versions are treated as compromised.
scope.ectoFlagRead: Checks for npm package ecto-flag-read from SupplyChainAttack reporting; all observed versions are treated as compromised.
scope.validateSdkV2: Checks for npm package @validate-sdk/v2 from GitHub Advisory GHSA-vqg9-785x-8j39; all versions are treated as compromised.
scope.googleCloudSecretManagerConfigPoc: Checks for npm package google-cloud-secret-manager-config-poc from GitHub Advisory GHSA-g6v5-9xpp-6hpx; all versions are treated as compromised.
scope.signupEmbedder: Checks for npm package signup-embedder from GitHub Advisory GHSA-8j4q-hx83-pfq9 and SupplyChainAttack reporting; affected versions >= 0 are treated as compromised.
scope.tsGrok: Checks for npm package ts-grok from GitHub Advisory GHSA-qp73-r9hh-6vq9 and SupplyChainAttack reporting; affected versions >= 0 are treated as compromised.
scope.otterCookieNpm: Checks for Panther April 2026 OtterCookie npm package names, Vercel-hosted C2 domains, and install-time behavior indicators.
scope.solanaFakeFix: Checks for JFrog Solana FakeFix and CMS Windows loader npm/PyPI package names plus Solana wallet, Telegram, Deno, fake RPC, and Windows persistence indicators.
scope.glassWasmOpenVsx: Checks for Socket GlassWASM/Open VSX affected extension references, known VSIX/WASM filenames, published SHA-256 values, TinyGo/WebAssembly host fingerprints, Solana memo dead-drop markers, dodod.lat, and child-process download/execute loaders.
scope.chromeCookieNativeMessagingHijack: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Malwarebytes-reported Chrome session-cookie theft involving fake .pfd.js PDF-lure attachments, malicious Chrome extension deployment through Chrome policy settings, ExtensionInstallForcelist/ExtensionSettings, NativeMessagingHosts, allowed_origins, chrome.runtime.sendNativeMessage, session-cookie theft, open-tab/URL/language/fingerprint collection, MFA bypass/account-takeover terms, native-host PowerShell execution, and C: drive enumeration.
scope.adblockForYoutube: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Island/THN Adblock for YouTube browser-extension IDs, related removed Adblock extension IDs, Adblock/Unistream infrastructure, and dormant server-controlled trusted-create-element / MAIN-world scriptlet injection terms.
scope.jetbrainsMarketplaceAiKeyStealers: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Aikido/BleepingComputer-reported malicious JetBrains Marketplace plugin IDs, exfiltration endpoint 39.107.60.51/api/software/key, and DFIR Radar-reported implementation markers including F48D2AA7CF341F782C1D, BaseUtil.request(), save()/Apply, and plaintext HTTP POST behavior.
scope.heavensGateWow64: Checks for weak-signal Heaven's Gate / WOW64 mode-switching evasion terms in local analysis notes or mounted-root metadata when those terms co-occur with shellcode, injection, EDR evasion, malware, or payload language plus stronger transition markers.
scope.paloAltoGlobalProtect0257: Checks GlobalProtect/PAN-OS log metadata for Unit 42-reported CVE-2026-0257 source IPs, client host ID/MAC/device-name values, and PoC client configuration values in successful gateway-connected events.
scope.cisaKevEdgeDeviceLatest: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for CISA KEV catalog version 2026.06.23 edge-device additions covering Lantronix EDS5000 CVE-2025-67038 and Ubiquiti UniFi OS CVE-2026-34908, CVE-2026-34909, and CVE-2026-34910, including Bishop Fox UniFi OS Server version, management-interface exposure, and RCE-chain triage markers.
scope.ciscoSdWanManager2026: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for GTIG-reported Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager exploitation involving CVE-2026-20245, CVE-2026-20127, CVE-2026-20182, rogue peer IP indicators, evil_tenant.csv tenant-upload execution, troot root-account artifacts, and Cisco fixed-release markers.
scope.ciscoCucmWebDialer20230: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Cisco Unified Communications Manager / Unified CM SME CVE-2026-20230 WebDialer SSRF, file-write/root-escalation language, and OSINT-reported full-chain webshell/Tor exploitation terms.
scope.exchangeJune2026: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Microsoft Exchange CVE-2026-45502 EWS InstallApp/ManifestUrl SSRF, CVE-2026-45504 SSRF/file-read privilege-escalation language, June 2026 KB/build markers, public PoC artifact markers, and Hawktrace WOPI/EWS file-read mechanics including ReferenceAttachment, ProviderEndpointUrl, GetWopiTargetPropertiesByUrl, WebApplicationUrl, FileWebRequest, and fragment-obfuscated file:// URLs.
scope.joomlaSpPageBuilder48908: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Censys-reported Joomla SP Page Builder CVE-2026-48908, affected versions 1.0.0 through 6.6.1, active exploitation notes, unauthenticated file-upload language, and potential RCE triage terms.
scope.dcatAuthGoogle2fa: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Nextron-reported malicious Packagist dcat-auth-google-2fa@1.0.2.0, r.keepex.xyz credential exfiltration, hardcoded 2FA bypass marker 979890, and obfuscated PHP co-occurrence.
scope.laravelLivewireCve202554068: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Laravel Livewire CVE-2025-54068 vulnerable livewire/livewire Composer versions before 3.6.4, broad v3 constraints needing lockfile verification, and Imperva-reported shoc.enz credential-theft campaign indicators including xantibot.pw, .env harvesting, APP_KEY/database extraction, FTP 47.129.100.149, Telegram, GoFile, and webhook.site exfiltration paths.
scope.vscodeAutorunBlockchainNpm: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for JFrog-reported hijacked html-to-gutenberg@4.2.11 and fetch-page-assets@1.2.9 npm versions, VS Code/Cursor folder-open tasks launching public/fonts/fa-solid-400.woff2, reported C2 and blockchain dead-drop strings, fake-font SHA-256 hashes, and Nextron's Go-package reuse lead as OSINT correlation.
scope.ffmpegPixelSmash8461: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for JFrog/Malwarebytes-reported FFmpeg PixelSmash CVE-2026-8461 MagicYUV decoder exposure, FFmpeg/libavcodec package posture, media ingestion surfaces, and MagicYUV disablement notes.
scope.operationHighland: Checks Sygnia Operation Highland / Velvet Ant indicators including published SHA-1 values, hidden credential-log paths, GS-Netcat/auditdb staging, Nginx/FastCGI bridge artifacts, C2/infrastructure strings, and process-masquerade markers.
scope.bluekitBitmPhishing: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Netcraft/BleepingComputer-reported BlueKit browser-in-the-middle phishing signals, including rrweb DOM streaming over WebSocket, custom CAPTCHA, WebRTC IP mismatch detection, browser fingerprint checks, CSS filter randomization, and phishing asset proxying language. rrweb alone is treated as context, not a standalone IOC.
scope.tonratPhotoZipPhishing: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for THN/SOC Prime-reported TonRAT hospitality phishing involving Booking Manager/Calendly and Google redirect lures, photo-*.zip archives, image-looking .png.lnk shortcuts, PowerShell stagers, user-space Node.js v24.13.0 under AppData\Local\Nodejs, TON blockchain API C2 discovery, encrypted WebSocket C2, and Run/RunOnce persistence notes.
scope.autoJackAgentLocalhost: Checks Microsoft AutoJack / AutoGen Studio local MCP control-plane posture terms including AutoGen Studio, StdioServerParams, server_params, /api/mcp/ws, localhost:8081, b047730, and reported autogenstudio pre-release versions. These are review prompts for agent-localhost trust-boundary risk.
scope.gogsPathTraversalRce: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Gogs deployment artifacts, app="Gogs" FOFA fingerprint notes, public Jorian Woltjer PoC references, and Gogs path-traversal or Git-hook RCE triage terms. These are exposure-review and authorized-research provenance prompts only.
scope.nfTablesCve202623111: Checks running-kernel range posture, nf_tables module/config presence, kernel.unprivileged_userns_clone exposure, kernel.org fix markers, nft_map_catchall_activate/inverted-genmask advisory terms, and public Baba01hacker666 PoC/checker artifact markers for CVE-2026-23111.
scope.ptcWindchillCve202612569: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for CISA KEV catalog version 2026.06.25 PTC Windchill and FlexPLM CVE-2026-12569, PTC advisory CS473270, improper-input-validation/RCE language, X-windchill-req request header notes, and JSP web shell paths such as /Windchill/login/<16 hex>.jsp.
scope.pythonOrgReleaseApiTrust: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for the June 2026 python.org release-management API authentication-bypass disclosure, February 24 2026 patch context, mutable release-file URL notes, downloads.nyc1.psf.io / www.python.org/ftp/python references, Sigstore/PGP/PEP 761 provenance terms, and Python release-looking download URLs outside official python.org/PSF hosts.
scope.langflowCve202633017Cryptominer: Checks local and mounted-root metadata for Langflow CVE-2026-33017 / GHSA-vwmf-pq79-vjvx, PyPI langflow versions before 1.9.0, POST /api/v1/build_public_tmp/{flow_id}/flow, attacker-controlled data/FlowDataRequest/public-flow build RCE terms, unsandboxed exec()/prepare_global_scope notes, and SecurityOnline-reported cryptominer campaign markers including KORKERDS, init_rmount, Kinsing kill-list behavior, XMRig/Monero/miner language, reused SSH keys, and SSH worm lateral-movement notes.
